prompt_inputs.goal: Fuel a 20km long run training session with optimal carbohydrate timing and recovery

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals plus pre/during/post-workout nutrition around the long run
Includes sufficient carbohydrates (6-10g per kg body weight) distributed strategically for endurance performance
All meals and snacks are vegetarian and dairy-free
Meal timing aligns with training session (e.g., light carbs 2-3 hours before, fast carbs during/after)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a professional endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific timing around long training sessions

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize strength and power for weightlifting competition with two heavy training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes minimum 2.2g protein per kg body weight (~210g total)
Plan accounts for two distinct heavy training windows with appropriate pre/post-workout nutrition
Total daily calories support strength athlete needs (~3500-3800 kcal for 95kg lifter)
Plan is presented in compact, single-day format with 4-5 meals/snacks
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring high protein intake and caloric density with multiple heavy training windows throughout the day

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain performance and energy for moderate intensity soccer training and match

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All foods are vegan-compliant with no animal products
Includes adequate protein and carbohydrates for soccer performance
Meals are practical and concise without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific athlete with dietary restrictions (vegan soccer player) requiring balanced nutrition while accommodating ethical food choices and moderate intensity training schedule
